name: business-model-toolkit
description: Interactive business model brainstorming — guided dialogue covering the full startup lifecycle from problem validation through execution and investor pitch.

plugins.name: business-model-toolkit
plugins.description: Guided startup lifecycle brainstorming: 21 phases across 3 spaces (Problem-Hypothesis, Solution-Validation, Execution-Acceleration). Auto-activating skills by lifecycle phase — now including a dedicated brand-identity skill (Brand Steering Wheel + Limbic Map emotional positioning + tone of voice) and an OKR + KPI-reporting operational layer in execution-plan. Combines Running Lean, Lean Canvas, and Founder Institute methodology.
